embarrassed.example: I felt embarrassed when I forgot my lines during the play.
embarrassed.exampleCn: 我在剧中忘词时感到窘迫。

announce.example: The principal will announce the exam results tomorrow morning.
announce.exampleCn: 校长将于明天早上宣布考试结果。

hoax.example: The news about aliens was later proved to be a hoax.
hoax.exampleCn: 关于外星人的新闻后来被证明是一个骗局。

cancel.example: We had to cancel the picnic because of the heavy rain.
cancel.exampleCn: 由于大雨，我们不得不取消野餐。

officer.example: The police officer helped the lost child find her parents.
officer.exampleCn: 警察帮助迷路的孩子找到了她的父母。

by the time.example: By the time we arrived, the concert had already started.
by the time.exampleCn: 当我们到达时，音乐会已经开始了。

go off.example: My alarm clock did not go off, so I was late for school.
go off.exampleCn: 我的闹钟没有响，所以我上学迟到了。

rush out.example: Everyone rushed out of the building when the fire alarm sounded.
rush out.exampleCn: 火警响起时，每个人都冲出了大楼。

be full of.example: The garden is full of colorful flowers in spring.
be full of.exampleCn: 春天花园里充满了五颜六色的花朵。

be about to do sth.example: I was about to leave when the phone suddenly rang.
be about to do sth.exampleCn: 我正打算离开时，电话突然响了。

wait in line with.example: We waited in line with hundreds of people to buy tickets.
wait in line with.exampleCn: 我们和数百人一起排队买票。

stare at.example: It is rude to stare at strangers in public places.
stare at.exampleCn: 在公共场所盯着陌生人看是不礼貌的。

in disbelief.example: She stared at the exam score in disbelief.
in disbelief.exampleCn: 她难以置信地盯着考试分数。

get a chance to do.example: I hope to get a chance to do volunteer work this summer.
get a chance to do.exampleCn: 我希望今年夏天有机会做志愿工作。

hear about.example: I heard about the new museum from my classmates yesterday.
hear about.exampleCn: 昨天我从同学那里听说了新博物馆。

think to oneself.example: He thought to himself that the plan might not work.
think to oneself.exampleCn: 他暗想这个计划可能行不通。

leave for school.example: I usually leave for school at seven in the morning.
leave for school.exampleCn: 我通常早上七点前往学校。

by dinner time.example: By dinner time, we had finished all our homework.
by dinner time.exampleCn: 到晚餐时，我们已经完成了所有作业。

get dressed.example: I get dressed quickly every morning to catch the early bus.
get dressed.exampleCn: 我每天早上快速穿好衣服去赶早班车。

show up.example: Please show up on time for the important meeting tomorrow.
show up.exampleCn: 请明天准时出席重要会议。

an introduction to April Fool's.example: The teacher gave us an introduction to April Fool's traditions.
an introduction to April Fool's.exampleCn: 老师给我们介绍了愚人节的传统。

make a fool of.example: Do not make a fool of others; it can really hurt their feelings.
make a fool of.exampleCn: 不要取笑别人，这真的会伤害他们的感情。

stay up doing sth. all.example: He stayed up doing sth all night to finish his science project.
stay up doing sth. all.exampleCn: 他整晚熬夜做某事来完成他的科学项目。

the most embarrassing joke.example: That was the most embarrassing joke I have ever heard.
the most embarrassing joke.exampleCn: 那是我听过的最令人窘迫的玩笑。

a costume party.example: We had a costume party where everyone dressed as historical figures.
a costume party.exampleCn: 我们举办了一个化装舞会，每个人都打扮成历史人物。

invite sb. to.example: I want to invite my best friend to my birthday party.
invite sb. to.exampleCn: 我想邀请我最好的朋友来参加我的生日派对。

sell out.example: The concert tickets sold out within an hour of going on sale.
sell out.exampleCn: 音乐会门票在开售后一小时内就卖完了。

be sold out.example: All the books were sold out before the end of the book fair.
be sold out.exampleCn: 书展结束前所有的书都被卖完了。

across the whole country.example: The news spread across the whole country in just one day.
across the whole country.exampleCn: 这条消息在一天之内就传遍了全国。

hundreds of.example: Hundreds of people came to watch the dragon boat race.
hundreds of.exampleCn: 数以百计的人来观看龙舟比赛。

play tricks.example: On April Fool's Day, people love to play tricks on friends.
play tricks.exampleCn: 愚人节那天，人们喜欢捉弄朋友。

be fooled by others.example: Be careful not to be fooled by others on April Fool's Day.
be fooled by others.exampleCn: 愚人节要小心不要被别人愚弄。

help sb. lose weight.example: My doctor gave me advice to help me lose weight healthily.
help sb. lose weight.exampleCn: 我的医生给了我健康减肥的建议。

be canceled.example: The outdoor event was canceled because of the storm warning.
be canceled.exampleCn: 由于暴风雨预警，户外活动被取消了。

oversleep.example: I overslept this morning and missed the first class.
oversleep.exampleCn: 我今天早上睡过头了，错过了第一节课。

stare.example: It is impolite to stare at people who look different from you.
stare.exampleCn: 盯着与你不同的人看是不礼貌的。

Fool foolish.example: It is foolish to give up when you are so close to success.
Fool foolish.exampleCn: 当你离成功这么近时放弃是愚蠢的。

disappear.example: The old traditions should not disappear from our modern life.
disappear.exampleCn: 古老的传统不应该从我们的现代生活中消失。

turn into.example: The caterpillar will turn into a beautiful butterfly soon.
turn into.exampleCn: 毛毛虫很快会变成一只美丽的蝴蝶。

litter.example: Please do not litter; keep our city clean and beautiful.
litter.exampleCn: 请不要乱扔垃圾，保持我们的城市干净美丽。

advantage.example: Reading books has the advantage of improving your vocabulary.
advantage.exampleCn: 读书有提高词汇量的优点。

plastic.example: We should reduce plastic waste to protect ocean animals.
plastic.exampleCn: 我们应该减少塑料垃圾来保护海洋动物。

cruel.example: Being cruel to animals is something no kind person would do.
cruel.exampleCn: 虐待动物是善良的人会做的事情。

ecosystem.example: The forest ecosystem depends on every plant and animal living there.
ecosystem.exampleCn: 森林生态系统依赖于生活在那里的每一种植物和动物。

afford.example: Education should be something every family can afford.
afford.exampleCn: 教育应该是每个家庭都能承担得起的东西。

recycle.example: We should recycle paper, plastic, and glass to save resources.
recycle.exampleCn: 我们应该回收纸张、塑料和玻璃来节约资源。

creativity.example: Schools should encourage creativity, not just memorization.
creativity.exampleCn: 学校应该鼓励创造力，而不仅仅是死记硬背。

metal.example: Metal cans can be recycled into new products easily.
metal.exampleCn: 金属罐可以很容易地回收制成新产品。

fisherman.example: The fisherman caught a big fish early in the morning.
fisherman.exampleCn: 渔夫一大早就钓到了一条大鱼。

ugly.example: Do not judge a person by their appearance, whether beautiful or ugly.
ugly.exampleCn: 不要以貌取人，无论美丑。

wooden.example: The old bridge was made of strong wooden boards.
wooden.exampleCn: 这座老桥由结实的木板制成。

harmful.example: Smoking is harmful to your lungs and overall health.
harmful.exampleCn: 吸烟对你的肺和整体健康有害。

industry.example: The tourism industry is very important for Yunnan's economy.
industry.exampleCn: 旅游业对云南的经济非常重要。

law.example: Everyone must follow the law to keep society fair and safe.
law.exampleCn: 每个人都必须遵守法律，以保持社会公平和安全。

scientific.example: Scientific research helps us understand the world better.
scientific.exampleCn: 科学研究帮助我们更好地理解世界。

reusable.example: Using reusable bags helps reduce plastic pollution.
reusable.exampleCn: 使用可重复使用的袋子有助于减少塑料污染。

transportation.example: Public transportation in big cities needs to be improved.
transportation.exampleCn: 大城市的公共交通需要改善。

inspiration.example: Nature is a great source of inspiration for artists and writers.
inspiration.exampleCn: 自然是艺术家和作家灵感的重要来源。

be harmful to.example: Too much sugar is harmful to your teeth and body.
be harmful to.exampleCn: 太多糖对你的牙齿和身体有害。

at the top of.example: The flag flies at the top of the mountain every morning.
at the top of.exampleCn: 旗帜每天早上在山顶飘扬。

the food chain.example: Every living thing plays a role in the food chain.
the food chain.exampleCn: 每个生物在食物链中都扮演着角色。

turn off.example: Please turn off the lights when you leave the room.

pay for.example: You must pay for your own mistakes and learn from them.
pay for.exampleCn: 你必须为自己的错误付出代价并从中学习。

take action.example: It is time to take action to protect our environment.
take action.exampleCn: 是时候采取行动保护我们的环境了。

throw away.example: Do not throw away old clothes; donate them to those in need.
throw away.exampleCn: 不要扔掉旧衣服，把它们捐给需要的人。

put sth. to good use.example: We should put old materials to good use instead of wasting them.
put sth. to good use.exampleCn: 我们应该好好利用旧材料，而不是浪费它们。

bring back.example: This song brings back memories of my childhood summers.
bring back.exampleCn: 这首歌让我想起了童年夏天的回忆。

make a difference.example: Even small actions can make a difference in protecting nature.
make a difference.exampleCn: 即使是小行动也能在保护自然方面起作用。

hear of.example: Have you heard of the famous Stone Forest in Yunnan?
hear of.exampleCn: 你听说过云南著名的石林吗？

cut off.example: The storm cut off electricity to the whole village.
cut off.exampleCn: 暴风雨切断了整个村庄的电力。

meanings: 对某人来说是一个鼓舞人心的人
be an inspiration to sb.example: My grandmother is an inspiration to everyone in our family.
be an inspiration to sb.exampleCn: 我的奶奶对我们家里的每个人都是一个鼓舞人心的人。

instead of doing sth.example: Instead of doing sth boring, let's go hiking this weekend.
instead of doing sth.exampleCn: 与其做无聊的事情，不如这个周末去徒步吧。

bottom.example: At the bottom of the lake, divers found ancient pottery.
bottom.exampleCn: 在湖底，潜水员发现了古代陶器。

Recycle.example: Recycle paper helps reduce the number of trees we need to cut.
Recycle.exampleCn: 可回收纸张有助于减少我们需要砍伐的树木数量。

Work.example: This famous painting is the artist's greatest work.
Work.exampleCn: 这幅著名的画是这位艺术家最伟大的作品。

turn down.example: Please turn down the music; it is too loud for studying.
turn down.exampleCn: 请把音乐调小，太大声了无法学习。

set up.example: The students set up a reading corner in their classroom.
set up.exampleCn: 学生们在教室里设立了一个阅读角。

set off.example: We set off fireworks to celebrate the Spring Festival.
set off.exampleCn: 我们燃放烟花来庆祝春节。

standard.example: We should set high standards for ourselves in everything we do.
standard.exampleCn: 我们应该在所做的每件事上为自己设定高标准。

method.example: Finding the right method makes learning much easier.
method.exampleCn: 找到正确的方法让学习变得容易得多。

graduate.example: I will graduate from middle school next summer.
graduate.exampleCn: 我将于明年夏天从中学毕业。

text.example: The text in this book tells stories from ancient China.
text.exampleCn: 这本书中的课文讲述了来自中国古代的故事。

manager.example: The restaurant manager greeted every customer with a warm smile.
manager.exampleCn: 餐厅经理用温暖的微笑迎接每一位顾客。

congratulate.example: I want to congratulate you on winning the English speech contest.
congratulate.exampleCn: 我要祝贺你赢得英语演讲比赛。

task.example: Working together makes any difficult task feel easier.
task.exampleCn: 一起合作让任何困难的任务感觉更容易。

separate.example: We have separate rooms for reading and playing games.
separate.exampleCn: 我们有单独的房间用于阅读和玩游戏。

survey.example: Our class did a survey about favorite outdoor activities.
survey.exampleCn: 我们班做了一个关于最喜欢的户外活动的调查。

instruction.example: Please follow the instruction carefully when using the machine.
instruction.exampleCn: 使用机器时请仔细遵循指示。

caring.example: A caring teacher can change a student's whole life.
caring.exampleCn: 一个体贴的老师可以改变学生的一生。

thirsty.example: After running, I felt thirsty and drank a whole bottle of water.
thirsty.exampleCn: 跑步后，我感到口渴，喝了一整瓶水。

thankful.example: I am thankful for all the people who helped me grow.
thankful.exampleCn: 我感谢所有帮助过我成长的人。

ahead.example: Look ahead, and you will see the school gate in the distance.
ahead.exampleCn: 向前看，你会看到远处的学校大门。

responsible.example: Being responsible means doing what you promise to do.
responsible.exampleCn: 负责任意味着做你承诺要做的事情。

in a row.example: The students stood in a row, waiting for the flag-raising ceremony.
in a row.exampleCn: 学生们站成一排，等待升旗仪式。

do a survey.example: We decided to do a survey about students' reading habits.
do a survey.exampleCn: 我们决定做一个关于学生阅读习惯的调查。

be patient with sb.example: A good teacher is always patient with every student.
be patient with sb.exampleCn: 一个好老师总是对每个学生都有耐心。

work out.example: Can you help me work out this difficult math problem?
work out.exampleCn: 你能帮我解答这道难题吗？

put in more effort.example: If you put in more effort, your grades will surely improve.
put in more effort.exampleCn: 如果你更加努力，你的成绩肯定会提高。

look back at.example: When you look back at your school years, you will feel proud.
look back at.exampleCn: 当你回首你的学校岁月时，你会感到自豪。

make a mess.example: The children made a mess in the kitchen while baking cookies.
make a mess.exampleCn: 孩子们在烤饼干时把厨房弄得一团糟。

keep my cool.example: Even during the exam, I tried to keep my cool and think clearly.
keep my cool.exampleCn: 即使在考试期间，我也努力保持冷静，清晰思考。

look forward to doing sth.example: I look forward to doing sth fun with my friends this summer.
look forward to doing sth.exampleCn: 我期望今年夏天和朋友们做一些有趣的事情。

believe in sb.example: If you believe in yourself, others will believe in you too.
believe in sb.exampleCn: 如果你相信自己，别人也会相信你。

first of all.example: First of all, let me thank everyone for coming today.
first of all.exampleCn: 首先，让我感谢今天到场的每个人。

be responsible for.example: Everyone should be responsible for keeping the classroom clean.
be responsible for.exampleCn: 每个人都应该负责保持教室清洁。

ahead of sb.example: She ran ahead of everyone else in the race.
ahead of sb.exampleCn: 她在比赛中跑在所有人前面。

be thankful to sb.example: We should be thankful to our parents for their endless love.
be thankful to sb.exampleCn: 我们应该感谢父母无尽的爱。

be thirsty for.example: He is thirsty for knowledge and reads books every day.
be thirsty for.exampleCn: 他渴求知识，每天都读书。

set out.example: We set out early in the morning to climb the mountain.
set out.exampleCn: 我们一大早出发去爬山。

separate from.example: It is hard to separate from friends when you move to a new city.
separate from.exampleCn: 当你搬到新城市时，与朋友分离是很难的。

get a business degree.example: She plans to get a business degree after high school.
get a business degree.exampleCn: 她计划在高中毕业后获得商学位。

graduation.example: Graduation is both an ending and a new beginning in life.
graduation.exampleCn: 毕业既是结束，也是人生的新开始。

overcome.example: With courage, we can overcome any difficulty in our path.
overcome.exampleCn: 有勇气，我们可以克服道路上的任何困难。

make a mess of.example: He made a mess of his room and had to clean it up.
make a mess of.exampleCn: 他把房间弄得一团糟，不得不清理。

help each other.example: True friends always help each other when times are hard.
help each other.exampleCn: 真正的朋友总是在困难时期互相帮助。

care for each other.example: In a good family, members care for each other every day.
care for each other.exampleCn: 在一个好的家庭里，成员们每天互相关心。

learn from each other.example: Students from different cultures can learn from each other.
learn from each other.exampleCn: 来自不同文化的学生可以互相学习。

promote the friendship.example: Sharing hobbies is a great way to promote the friendship.
promote the friendship.exampleCn: 分享爱好是增进友谊的好方法。

improve the relationship.example: Honest communication can improve the relationship between friends.
improve the relationship.exampleCn: 诚实的沟通可以改善朋友之间的关系。

trust each other.example: Good teamwork starts when people trust each other completely.
trust each other.exampleCn: 当人们完全信任彼此时，良好的团队合作就开始了。

build a good relationship.example: Respect and honesty help build a good relationship with anyone.
build a good relationship.exampleCn: 尊重和诚实有助于与任何人建立良好的关系。
